display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Top Shelf
programme.desc: Great plays don't discriminate but with so many games, it's nearly impossible to catch them all. This show fills in the gaps and keeps fans abreast of the latest eye-popping moves, tricks and stops.

programme.title: Live: NHL Now
programme.desc: A front row seat to the news and happenings from around the league, as hosts E.J. Hradek and Jackie Redmond, along with NHL Insiders, set up for a night of NHL game action.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.desc: From Prospera Place in Kelowna, British Columbia.

programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.desc: From BCF Arena in Fribourg, Switzerland.

programme.title: NHL Network Countdown
programme.desc: A look back at the trios that formed the greatest offensive lines in NHL history.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.desc: From Swiss Life Arena in Zürich, Switzerland.

programme.title: Breaking Down Barriers
programme.desc: First Assist, founded by former NHL player John Chabot, aims to help Indigenous students succeed in school by using sports as a motivational tool to boost attendance, classroom engagement and promote healthy life habits.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Enjoy all the highlights from the previous evening's NHL action and stay informed with comprehensive post-game analysis, scores, interviews and breaking news.

programme.desc: A look at the growth of ice hockey in Puerto Rico.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Alexis, Lynn, Caleb, and Ian compete.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Besties Tia and Berni battle life partners Cotton and Lewis.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Three new contestants compete.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Carmen, a social worker, and Toni, an account executive, are wives from Ann Arbor, Michigan; after helping so many others, now might be their turn for a massive payout -- if they have what it takes to brave the wall.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: Contestants from Haiti, Michigan and Washington compete.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Miller Family vs. Federgreen Family.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Cousins Dave and Brianna challenge mother- and daughter-in-law Cheryl and Alexis.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Kim, Ovi, Michelle, and Steve.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: James Holzhauer's down-to-the finals contest against Emma Boettcher.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants include Bridget Moynahan, Jay Glazer, Chris Sullivan and Jennie Garth.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants travel to South Africa to try to win the top prize; viewers get the chance to help select the next "Deal or No Deal" model.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In Las Vegas.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Dionne, Gabriel, Carol and Lori compete.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Besties Mira and Peyton battle Otis and Stacy.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Three new contestants compete.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Melvin, a FedEx driver, and Meredith, a respiratory therapist, are a father and daughter duo from Michigan; Melvin recently went viral for shoveling snow off of his customer's doorstep; they hope to clear the way to millions just as easily.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: From Charles Schwab Field Omaha in Omaha, Neb.

programme.title: Minnesota Football Classic
programme.desc: Jalen Smith scored his second touchdown of the game on a diving 12-yard catch in overtime to lift the Golden Gophers to a 20-17 victory over the Lobos. From Dec. 26, 2025.

programme.title: Illinois Football Classic
programme.desc: David Olano kicked a 29-yard field goal as time expired to lift the Fighting Illini to a 30-28 victory over the Volunteers. From Dec. 30, 2025.

programme.title: Penn State Football Classic
programme.desc: Ethan Grunkemeyer passed for 262 yards and two touchdowns to lead the Nittany Lions to a 22-10 victory over the Tigers at Yankees Stadium. From Dec. 27, 2025.

programme.title: Iowa Football Classic
programme.desc: Mark Gronowski threw for two touchdowns and rushed for another to lead the 23rd-ranked Hawkeyes to a 34-27 victory over the 14th-ranked Commodores. From Dec. 31, 2025.

programme.title: Washington Football Classic
programme.desc: Demond Williams Jr. passed for four touchdowns to help the Huskies beat the Broncos, 38-10, in the LA Bowl. From Dec. 13, 2025.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: From Charles Schwab Field Omaha in Omaha, Neb.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: See how Roch Cholowsky is chasing a storybook ending to his collegiate career with UCLA. Get to know Michigan baseball's Elie Kligman. Learn how Maryland's Aubrey Wurst is pursuing a future in broadcast journalism.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: Get to know USC baseball's Walter Urbon; learn about Indiana softball's Lil Sis program; how Peyton Bonds, nephew of Barry Bonds, embraces his family name while creating his own path at Rutgers; Penn State's Brooke Klosowicz's love for baking.

programme.title: Northwestern Football Classic
programme.desc: Preston Stone passed for three touchdowns in the Wildcats' 34-7 victory over the Chippewas at Ford Field. From Dec. 26, 2025.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: From Husky Stadium in Seattle, Wash.

programme.title: B1G Football in 60
programme.desc: Kaytron Allen rushed for 181 yards and two touchdowns to help the Nittany Lions beat the Spartans, 28-10. From Nov. 15, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Football in 60
programme.desc: Darrion Dupree rushed for 131 yards and two touchdowns to help the Badgers upset the 21st-ranked Fighting Illini, 27-10. From Nov. 22, 2025.

programme.title: College Rowing
programme.desc: Action from the oldest intercollegiate sport in the United States.

programme.title: B1G Trailblazers
programme.desc: Four-time All-American and UCLA basketball legend Ann Meyers Drysdale sits down with Dave Revsine to discuss her trailblazing career playing for the Bruins and beyond.

programme.title: Live: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: Ohio State Football Classic
programme.desc: Julian Sayin threw for 233 yards and three touchdowns in the top-ranked Buckeyes' 27-9 victory over the 15th-ranked Wolverines. From Nov. 29, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: Get to know USC baseball's Walter Urbon; learn about Indiana softball's Lil Sis program; how Peyton Bonds, nephew of Barry Bonds, embraces his family name while creating his own path at Rutgers; Penn State's Brooke Klosowicz's love for baking.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: Learn about Ava Carroll's journey to Washington. See how head coach Jake Boss Jr.'s father has continued to support him and the Michigan State baseball program. Get to know Wisconsin's Hilary and Addison Blomberg.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Looking back at what is known as "The Catch," hear from Trojans quarterback Rodney Peete and wide receiver Erik Affholter as they relive the controversial play that sent USC to the 1988 Rose Bowl with a win over crosstown rival UCLA.

programme.title: USC Football Classic
programme.desc: King Miller rushed for 124 yards and two touchdowns to help lead the 17th-ranked Trojans to a 29-10 win over the Bruins. From Nov. 29, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: From Ohio Stadium in Columbus, Ohio.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Football
programme.desc: Julian Sayin's journey to becoming Ohio State's starting quarterback. Get to know wide receiver Jeremiah Smith. Plus, highlights from the Buckeyes' victory over the Wolverines.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: B1G Football in 60
programme.desc: Julian Sayin passed for two touchdowns and CJ Donaldson ran in two more scores for the top-ranked Buckeyes in their 34-16 victory over the 17th-ranked Fighting Illini. From Oct. 11, 2025.

programme.title: Live: FanDuel Racing
programme.desc: Live horse racing from around the country.

programme.desc: NY Knicks playoff pre game.

programme.desc: Replays of classic boxing matches.

programme.title: Live: Boston Has Entered the Chat
programme.desc: A daily show featuring conversational debate that sets up the day in Boston sports. The format incorporates social media and timely guests to inform and entertain fans of New England sports teams.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: Liverpool Football
programme.desc: An encore presentation of Liverpool's on-field action from the past week plus behind-the-scenes team access and social media clips.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: A showcase of the most popular videos and social media highlights from across Liverpool Football Club, its players and its supporters.

programme.title: Boston Has Entered the Chat
programme.desc: A daily show featuring conversational debate that sets up the day in Boston sports. The format incorporates social media and timely guests to inform and entertain fans of New England sports teams.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Todd Angilly, Boston Bruins' National Anthem singer, joins Charlie on Lake Winnipesaukee where Todd fishes for his first ever smallmouth bass. Charlie and Todd head to the Boat Bar and Todd makes Charlie two cocktails.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie heads out for a mid-summer's day of fishing. A bee sting threatens to derail the trip. As a result, Charlie deals with medical issues while on the water. Charlie searches for largemouth and smallmouth bass. Ultimately, the bee wins.

programme.title: Red Sox: On This Day
programme.desc: From 2010. Four Red Sox pitchers combine for a 1-hit shutout, led by Jon Lester and his 6 innings and 9 strikeouts, and are powered offensively by a 2-run double by David Ortiz in the 3rd inning to take down the division rival Rays 2-0.

programme.title: Life in Between Gates
programme.desc: Following racers as they prepare for their first event of the season in Colorado.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Secret to More Energy, Better Focus & Restful Sleep
programme.desc: MyMagnesiumTM ProClinical delivers 350 mg of highly absorbable magnesium plus clinically studied Shoden® Ashwagandha, vitamin D, Zinc, Boron, and antioxidant-rich organic blueberries—designed to support calm focus, steady energy, and deeper sleep.

programme.title: ACC PM
programme.desc: Tune into ACC Network's daily news and information show - with the biggest storylines and best guests from across the ACC.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 17 Cavaliers (10-2) and Blue Devils (7-5) compete for the ACC championship. Virginia defeated Duke 34-17 in November. Cavaliers senior J'Mari Taylor has rushed for 14 touchdowns. Blue Devils sophomore Darian Mensah boasts 28 touchdown passes.

programme.title: CFP Quarterfinal at the Goodyear Cotton Bowl Classic
programme.desc: The No. 10 Miami Hurricanes face the No. 2 Ohio State Buckeyes at AT&T Stadium. This is a high-stakes College Football Playoff Quarterfinal matchup. Miami advanced after a gritty 10-3 road upset over No. 7 Texas A&M in the CFP First Round.
